use_cases: Displaying subscription tier options for SaaS products with Starter, Pro, and Enterprise plans
Comparing feature availability across different service packages
Converting visitors by highlighting a recommended plan with visual emphasis
Presenting pricing information for digital products or online services
ai_summary: A clean three-tier pricing component displaying Starter ($499), Pro ($1,299), and Enterprise (Custom) plans with feature lists. Features a minimalist flat design with sharp corners, subtle borders, and a special border treatment that emphasizes the middle Pro tier as recommended. Ideal for SaaS landing pages and product pricing sections where users need to compare plan features.
